# AI Behavior Rules

AI agents must follow the read order in `AGENTS.md`:

1. `AGENTS.md`
2. `PROJECT_CONTEXT.md`
3. `docs/AI_PROJECT_MANUAL.md`
4. `.github/ALL_MARKDOWN.md`
5. `README.md`
6. relevant architecture docs

Agents must not add dependencies, weaken tests, expose secret values, introduce framework-specific code, document fake features, or claim Maven Central availability before publication.

Behavior changes require implementation, tests, docs, architecture updates when relevant, and changelog updates.
